# Internal Orchestrator Docs

This folder contains internal orchestration assets for maintainers and contributors.

- `../Orchestrator.Agent.md`: canonical orchestrator definition used for routing and workflow coordination.
- `docs/deployment.md`: deployment and integration guidance.
- `docs/integration-examples.md`: end-to-end invocation examples.

Use the top-level `.github/agents/README.md` for runtime package usage and entry points.
